Who is Bard?

The voice behind the wall.

Bard is a street bard — a quiet storyteller who turns the voices of the streets into art and culture. Every piece carries fragments of real lives, forgotten corners, and everyday struggles, transforming ordinary stories into timeless expressions that preserve the spirit of the streets.

Booking

Start a commission.

Tell Bard about your wall, your story, and your timeline. Every request is reviewed personally before a quote and schedule are confirmed.

  • 01 — Submit Send your project brief through the form.
  • 02 — Review Bard reviews scope, size, and timeline.
  • 03 — Quote You'll receive a price quotation to confirm.
  • 04 — Schedule Your project is added to the calendar.
✓ Request sent. Bard will review it and get back to you.
